ddls:
CREATE TABLE "watches" (
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of watch (e.g., Watch) */,
  "current_stock_id" TEXT /* Current stock ID for the watch */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the watch */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the watch (e.g., Used) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the watch (e.g., Rolex) */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the watch */,
  "serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the watch */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the watch (e.g., Datejust) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the watch (e.g., 36mm) */,
  "metal" TEXT /* Material of the watch (e.g., White Gold) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the watch in grams */,
  "partners" TEXT /* Partners associated with the watch */,
  "warehouse" TEXT /* Warehouse where the watch is stored */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the watch (e.g., Per/Pc) */,
  "vendor_doc_number" TEXT /* Vendor document number for the watch */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the watch */,
  "dop" TEXT /* Date of purchase for the watch */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the watch was manufactured */,
  "dial_color" TEXT /* Color of the watch dial */,
  "strap_material" TEXT /* Material of the watch strap */,
  "water_resistance" TEXT /* Water resistance level of the watch */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., automatic, quartz) */,
  "warranty_status" TEXT /* Status of the watch's warranty */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_due" TEXT /* Date when the next inspection is due */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the watch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watches_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watches_supplier FOREIGN KEY ("supplier") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watches_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watches_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watches_partners FOREIGN KEY ("partners") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watches_warehouse FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watches_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watches_model_number FOREIGN KEY ("model_number") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the category */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active (1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is from */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the watch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the model */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is discontinued (1 for discontinued, 0 for active) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the partner */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the partner */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Indicates the status of the partnership (1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse contact */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit (e.g., 1 for Per/Pc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Indicates the status of the supplier (1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first made a purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Indicates the status of the customer (1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watch being sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the watch sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price after discount */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_watch_id FOREIGN KEY ("watch_id") REFERENCES watches ("watch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost */,
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watch */,
  "cost_code" TEXT /* Code for the cost (e.g., 9100) */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Price of the cost */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the cost */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_costs_watch_id FOREIGN KEY ("watch_id") REFERENCES watches ("watch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gallery_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watch */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., main, side, back) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gallery_images_watch_id FOREIGN KEY ("watch_id") REFERENCES watches ("watch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thumbnails" (
  "thumbnail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thumbnail */,
  "watch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watch */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of thumbnail (e.g., main, side, back) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the thumbnail was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thumbnail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thumbnails_watch_id FOREIGN KEY ("watch_id") REFERENCES watches ("watch_id")
)
